text.title: Page Object Pattern at Scale (Playwright / Cypress) Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating Page Object Pattern at Scale (Playwright / Cypress) against a realistic input.

example.title: pop-2026-q1 Playwright migration
example.note: Cypress suite of 47 tests with raw selectors migrated to Playwright + page objects. 8 page classes, average 6 actions each; locator hierarchy role+test-id covers 92% of locators. Contract test broke on PR #1308 when a teammate renamed LoginPage.submit() to LoginPage.signIn(); the renamer added an alias; suite passed. Flaky-test rate dropped from 4% to 0.5% after sleep removal.

example.title: God-class page after 18 months
example.note: ShoppingPage exposes 41 actions, 600 lines, no contract test. Adding a checkout-as-guest flow took 3 days because selectors collided. Three engineers each added a duplicate `clickCart()` method. Migration to per-flow split paid back in 1 sprint.
